title: overlay-scoring definition
description: A readiness / scoring definition as a single flat items list. Item ids are either a group header (no separator) or a leaf (exactly one separator). extension_points declare, per group selector, which items may be added and which numeric fields may be strengthened.

group.description: Group selector: exact id, prefix family ('L*'), or '*' (all).

level.description: For strengthen: whether the field is on the group header or on a leaf. Named 'level' (not 'on') because 'on' is a YAML 1.1 boolean keyword. Ignored for add.

field.description: For strengthen: the numeric field name.

direction.description: For strengthen: the stricter direction. lower = shorter SLA; higher = higher pass threshold.

item.description: A group header (id without separator) or a leaf (id with exactly one separator). Leaves may carry arbitrary opaque payload beyond declared numeric fields.

separator.description: The fixed group/leaf separator. One nesting level only.
